checks.notes: Input, Research Memo, Evidence, Quality, and Agent Timeline are discoverable.
Market, execution profile, question, Run, Upload, Import CSV are keyboard reachable and named.
Run status changes are announced without visual inspection.
Approval risk level, status, action, Approve, and Deny controls are announced with context.
Memo, citation/evidence area, cost/eval panel, and timeline are understandable.
No keyboard trap, unexpected focus loss, or unlabeled interactive control is observed.

redaction_review.notes: Use only non-sensitive fixtures and do not paste secrets into this evidence file.

summary: Template only. Manual screen-reader session has not been executed.
